summary: A clip from a Fox News segment labeled THE WILL CAIN SHOW. It shows a police press conference in BROOKHAVEN, GA where a uniformed official speaks at a podium with other officers behind him, an anchor at a desk beside a screenshot of a Department of Homeland Security Secretary post with a portrait, and a four-panel grid of police-scene footage from different cities. Lower-thirds read GA POLICE: THIS WAS A COMPLETELY RANDOM ATTACK, DHS: GA SHOOTING SUSPECT HAD PRIOR CRIMINAL RECORD, and STRING OF ATTACKS LINKED TO NATURALIZED CITIZENS.
